items.speaker: Emma
items.text: Have you ever ridden a horse?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L08-01 - E2081 - Emma - Have you ever ridden a horse.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: Have you ever flown on a plane?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L08-04 - E2084 - Mia - Have you ever flown on a plane.mp3

items.speaker: Mr. Carter
items.text: Nothing bad. We'll learn from the experience.
items.translation: Nada malo. Aprenderemos de la experiencia.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L26-03 - E2263 - Mr. Carter - Nothing bad. We'll learn from the experience.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Not yet. I don't have much experience.
items.translation: Todavía no. No tengo mucha experiencia.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L37-05 - E2375 - Ethan - Not yet. I don't have much experience.mp3

items.speaker: Manager
items.text: Have you ever worked with customers?

items.speaker: Noah
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L48-04 - E2484 - Noah - And mention your work experience.mp3
